who: kitchen managers in restaurants processing 5–15 service requests/month
offer: For kitchen managers in restaurants processing 5–15 service requests/month, inconsistent scheduling causes compliance issues. We streamline scheduling and tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent scheduling of equipment servicing leads to compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for kitchen managers seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on similar scheduling challenges
DM outreach to kitchen managers with a demo video
Community forums where kitchen managers share tools
try_it: Let users test tracking checklists and manual entry for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing service data
